Classify a paper from its text against a labelled store

Source: R/classify.R
classify.Rd

Classify a paper from its text against a labelled store

Usage

classify(store, text, k = 15L, fittable_threshold = 0.5)

Arguments

store

An nli_store from build_store() / build_model_store().

text

The paper text (e.g. a trimmed abstract+methods).

k

Neighbours to poll.

fittable_threshold

Similarity-weighted fittable fraction above which the paper is called fittable.

Value

A list: fittable (logical/NA), fittable_score, archetypes (top-3 similarity-weighted votes), mode ("embedding"/"keyword"), neighbors.
